display.label: topic.field
display.description: Field name for Kafka topic. Suffix with ! to make this a required field, or ? to keep it optional (the default).

display.label: partition.field
display.description: Field name for Kafka partition. Suffix with ! to make this a required field, or ? to keep it optional (the default).

display.label: offset.field
display.description:
Field name for Kafka offset - only applicable to sink connectors.
Suffix with ! to make this a required field, or ? to keep it optional (the default).

display.label: timestamp.field
display.description: Field name for record timestamp. Suffix with ! to make this a required field, or ? to keep it optional (the default).

display.label: static.field
display.description: Field name for static data field. Suffix with ! to make this a required field, or ? to keep it optional (the default).

display.label: static.value
display.description: Static field value, if field name configured.

display.label: replace.null.with.default
display.description: Whether to replace fields that have a default value and that are null to the default value. When set to true, the Default: true
